package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for gorm_locking_clauses_built_outside_repository: `FOR UPDATE` or similar locking behavior built in handlers or services instead of repository-owned methods.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: warning.
type Rule060NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule060NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule060NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario060Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule060NegativeService, input Rule060NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
